title: -Couch sliders stoppers
html:
November 2020 errand/grocery dump — couch sliders, plants for room, monitor, "Yermers pole for closet," Grocery Depot, seaweed, lancha cover, vet call, lightbulbs, Diet Coke, nuts. Mid-pandemic Corvallis household admin by Yahir.

yahir gonzalez · corvallis or · covid pandemic era
